name: 航天电器
verdict: （仅 Serenity 视角，未做段巴 BG 评估）

aleabit.layer_label: Layer 3 — 军工连接器/微特电机
aleabit.verdict_label: 🌊 国防+商业航天叙事,SOE 主导
aleabit.thesis: Connector/micro-motor supplier into Chinese defense + commercial space stack. SOE-controlled (CASIC 系), market cap ~340亿 puts it in upper bucket. Real chokepoint in mil-spec connectors but already widely held by domestic defense funds — discovery risk priced in.

signals.name: 供应链汇聚
signals.note: Mil-spec 连接器供 missile/航天/UAV 平台,集中度高但客户都是 SOE

signals.name: 分析师覆盖率 < 3
signals.note: 国内券商重点跟踪,西方机构因军工敏感少跟,但国内 coverage 充分

signals.name: 技术深度门槛
signals.note: 高可靠连接器/微特电机有显著技术壁垒

signals.name: 政府/国防关联
signals.note: CASIC 旗下,纯军工+航天供应链

signals.name: CEO 二级市场买入
signals.note: SOE,无创始人个人增持机制

red_flags: SOE 治理结构 limits CEO skin-in-the-game
市值已经反映防务+航天 narrative
aleabit.ai_relevance: Indirect — 卫星/低轨星座/UAV 是 AI 边缘节点的物理载体,但与 AI capex 主轴关联弱
